title: dortmanna doniana
intro: Dortmanna doniana, also known as the Water Dock or Water Dock Plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Polygonaceae. The plant is native to Europe and Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dortmanna doniana include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used topically to treat skin irritations and wounds.
